subject: White Spots Created in Warp, but not RELION5
body: Hello all, When processing a series of tomograms in warp, I'm observing some artificial bright white spots. The white spots spread along the rotation axis as the tilt increases. When I process in RELION5 using the same gain, reconstruction dimensions, and dose parameters the white dots are not present. I have also used both a .gain and tif2mrc converted gain thinking that could be the issue. Does anyone have any idea what might be different between the two reconstructions?
